violations.text: Several Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (torn/ripped). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - The tile floor was observed to have areas of cracked and/or missing tile exposing the subflooring below - The ceiling over the kitchen area was observed to be cracking/chipping - The wall covering behind the 3 bay sink was observed to have a seam that is no longer covered or sealed exposing the inner wall structure to moisture and debris The physical facilities is to be maintained in good repair and smooth, durable, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

A strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink at the dining room bar. A sink dedicated as a hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwashers in the kitchen and bar area was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC is to ensure all equipment utensils is properly sanitized in the 3 bay sink after washing and rinsing in the dishwasher(s). New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

At the time of inspection, the following in-use utensils were observed improperly stored in between uses... - a knife used for cutting at the pizza/sandwich prep units was observed stored in the clean knife holder in between uses - an ice scoop at the bar was observed stored on the ice. Utensils were adjusted for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Several Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (torn/ripped). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the deli slicer and the ice machine were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - The tile floor was observed to have areas of cracked and/or missing tile exposing the subflooring below - The ceiling over the kitchen area was observed to be cracking/chipping - The wall covering behind the 3 bay sink was observed to have a seam that is no longer covered or sealed exposing the inner wall structure to moisture and debris The physical facilities is to be maintained in good repair and smooth, durable, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Utensils and equipment to be sanitized in 3-bay sink until dishwashers are serviced. PIC put in service order at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

Poultry was cooked to 108 degrees Fahrenheit. Poultry must be cooked to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. PIC stated chicken is partially cooked and within 30 minutes cooked fully. Establishment to discontinue partially cooking chicken until procedures are submitted, reviewed, and approved. PIC stated establishment will discontinue partially cooking chicken. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The garage door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The basement has an accumulation of old droppings on the floor. Basement to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The floor in the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated floor will be repaired within the next few weeks. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024
